title: phyllanthus eliae
intro: Phyllanthus eliae, also known as the Ely's chequer tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Phyllanthus eliae include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for herbal use, and its leaves can be used to make a tea that is rich in flavonoids and other bioactive compounds.
